parameters.query:
SELECT
    i.secid,
    i.engine,
    i.market,
    i.board,
    i.instrument_group,
    i.issuer_name,
    interval_map.interval_code,
    interval_map.interval_name,
    interval_map.batch_days,
    interval_map.floor_days,
    CONCAT('moex:candle:', i.engine, ':', i.market, ':', i.board, ':', i.secid, ':', interval_map.interval_name) AS live_cursor_key,
    CONCAT('moex:candle_backfill:', i.engine, ':', i.market, ':', i.board, ':', i.secid, ':', interval_map.interval_name) AS backfill_cursor_key,
    live_wc.cursor_value AS live_cursor_value,
    backfill_wc.cursor_value AS backfill_cursor_value,
    backfill_wc.updated_at AS backfill_updated_at,
    earliest.first_candle_time
FROM ref.instrument AS i
CROSS JOIN (
    VALUES
        (1, '1m', 5, 90),
        (60, '1h', 30, 730),
        (24, '1d', 180, 3650),
        (7, '1w', 730, 7300)
) AS interval_map(interval_code, interval_name, batch_days, floor_days)
LEFT JOIN meta.workflow_cursor AS live_wc
    ON live_wc.workflow_key = CONCAT('moex:candle:', i.engine, ':', i.market, ':', i.board, ':', i.secid, ':', interval_map.interval_name)
LEFT JOIN meta.workflow_cursor AS backfill_wc
    ON backfill_wc.workflow_key = CONCAT('moex:candle_backfill:', i.engine, ':', i.market, ':', i.board, ':', i.secid, ':', interval_map.interval_name)
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT MIN(c.candle_time) AS first_candle_time
    FROM raw.candle AS c
    WHERE c.engine = i.engine
      AND c.market = i.market
      AND c.board = i.board
      AND c.secid = i.secid
      AND c.interval_name = interval_map.interval_name
) AS earliest ON TRUE
WHERE i.active = TRUE
  AND ($1::text = '' OR i.secid = $1::text)
  AND ($2::text = '' OR interval_map.interval_name = $2::text)
ORDER BY COALESCE(backfill_wc.updated_at, TO_TIMESTAMP(0)) ASC, i.secid, interval_map.interval_code
LIMIT CASE WHEN $3::int > 0 THEN $3::int ELSE 500 END;

WITH incoming AS (
    SELECT
        $1::text AS engine,
        $2::text AS market,
        $3::text AS board,
        $4::text AS secid,
        $5::integer AS interval_code,
        $6::text AS interval_name,
        value AS candle
    FROM jsonb_array_elements($7::jsonb) AS value
), upserted AS (
    INSERT INTO raw.candle (
        engine,
        market,
        board,
        secid,
        interval_code,
        interval_name,
        candle_time,
        open,
        high,
        low,
        close,
        volume,
        value,
        begin_at,
        end_at,
        payload,
        collected_at
    )
    SELECT
        engine,
        market,
        board,
        secid,
        interval_code,
        interval_name,
        NULLIF(candle->>'candle_time', '')::timestamptz,
        NULLIF(candle->>'open', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'high', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'low', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'close', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'volume', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'value', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'begin_at', '')::timestamptz,
        NULLIF(candle->>'end_at', '')::timestamptz,
        candle,
        NOW()
    FROM incoming
    WHERE NULLIF(candle->>'candle_time', '') IS NOT NULL
    ON CONFLICT (engine, market, board, secid, interval_name, candle_time)
    DO UPDATE SET
        interval_code = EXCLUDED.interval_code,
        open = EXCLUDED.open,
        high = EXCLUDED.high,
        low = EXCLUDED.low,
        close = EXCLUDED.close,
        volume = EXCLUDED.volume,
        value = EXCLUDED.value,
        begin_at = EXCLUDED.begin_at,
        end_at = EXCLUDED.end_at,
        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
        collected_at = NOW()
    RETURNING 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS upserted_rows FROM upserted;

INSERT INTO meta.workflow_cursor (
    workflow_key,
    cursor_value,
    payload,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
    $1,
    $2,
    $3::jsonb,
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (workflow_key)
DO UPDATE SET
    cursor_value = EXCLUDED.cursor_value,
    payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
    updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING workflow_key, cursor_value, updated_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.backfill_cursor_key, $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.cursor_next_value, JSON.stringify({ secid: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.secid, interval_name: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.interval_name, request_mode: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.request_mode, anchor_source: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.anchor_source, from_date: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.from_date, till_date: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.till_date, fetched_count: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.fetched_count, had_data: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.had_data, oldest_candle_time: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.oldest_candle_time, newest_candle_time: $('Normalize Backfill Batch').item.json.newest_candle_time }) ] }}
